name: Query SEB Server REST API to Export Configuration Data
description: Authenticate with the SEB Server REST API (http://localhost:8080) using OAuth2 credentials provided in ~/api_credentials.txt and the token endpoint http://localhost:8080/oauth/token. Query the administrative endpoints at http://localhost:8080/admin-api/v1/institution, http://localhost:8080/admin-api/v1/useraccount, and http://localhost:8080/admin-api/v1/configuration_node. Save the JSON responses to ~/api_export/institutions.json, ~/api_export/users.json, and ~/api_export/configurations.json respectively.
